# SegMap: Segment-based mapping and localization using data-driven descriptors

- **Work ID:** `LPR-081`
- **Reviewed version:** `doi:10.1177/0278364919863090`

## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** KITTI 00, KITTI 05, KITTI 06, KITTI 08, Gustav Knepper powerplant, Phoenix-West foundry — `source_fact`; manual, p. 8–14, § 5.2 Training Data;5.7 6-DoF Pose Retrieval;5.8 Complete System;5.9 Multi-Robot Experiments, Fig. 5-14;Table 2
- **input_unit:** incrementally grown 3D segment point cloud accumulated from a stream of LiDAR scans — `source_fact`; manual, p. 5–6, § 3. The SegMap Approach - Segmentation;4.1 Descriptor Extractor Architecture, Fig. 2-3
- **invariances:** none — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 2–13, § Abstract;4.2 Segment Alignment and Scaling;5.2.1 Data Augmentation;5.9.2 Disaster Environments, Fig. 1;Fig. 14
- **representation:** incremental region-growing 3D segments, PCA alignment, 32x32x16 binary voxel input, 3D CNN 64-D segment descriptor, k-NN retrieval and geometric-consistency verification, segment map with reconstruction and semantic heads — `source_fact`; manual, p. 3–7, § 3. The SegMap Approach;4. The SegMap Descriptor, Fig. 1-4
- **uses_learning:** yes — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–7, § Abstract;4.1 Descriptor Architecture;4.3 Training the SegMap Descriptor, Fig. 3-4;Eq. 1-3
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 5–6, § 3. The SegMap Approach;4. The SegMap Descriptor, Fig. 3
